name: edge
description: Situational profile. Grades calendar spots, travel, motivation, and context the math models miss.

lookahead_trap.description: Easy game before marquee matchup — team mentally elsewhere

letdown_spot.description: After emotional win / rivalry / OT game — letdown risk

motivation_gap.description: Playoff push vs lottery-bound / resting starters

division_familiarity.description: 3rd/4th meeting — diminishing edge, both sides know each other

season_phase.description: Early variance / mid stable / late tanking-resting

home_stand_road_trip.description: Deep into road trip (bad) or settled at home (good)

letdown_spot.description: After OT win / rivalry game / playoff-clinch

goalie_workload.description: Starter on B2B / 3rd start in 4 nights

division_familiarity.description: Late-season divisional — both sides fully scouted

schedule_spot.description: 3 games in 4 days / conference tournament grind

lookahead_trap.description: Trap game before rivalry or tournament — students distracted

letdown_spot.description: After huge upset win — Cinderella fatigue is real

motivation_gap.description: Bubble team desperate vs locked seed / NIT-bound

tournament_pressure.description: First-time tournament team nerves vs veteran program calm

travel_unfamiliarity.description: Playing far from campus — 18-year-olds in hostile gym

coaching_experience.description: Coach tournament experience — first-timers panic, veterans adjust

schedule_spot.description: Day game after night game / 4th game in getaway spot

pitching_rotation.description: Ace vs bullpen day / SP on short rest / pen usage L3d

motivation_gap.description: Playoff race vs sellers / September call-ups

travel_fatigue.description: Cross-country flight for 3-game set / west-to-east jet lag

bullpen_state.description: Pen usage last 3 days — taxed pen = late-inning collapse

day_night_split.description: Team/pitcher day vs night performance split

fixture_congestion_spot.description: UCL/UEL midweek + weekend league = heavy rotation risk — #1 soccer situational edge

european_travel.description: Away European trip (2000+ km) within 72hrs of domestic match

derby_motivation.description: Local derby / rivalry / relegation 6-pointer — peak intensity

rotation_risk.description: Manager rotation pattern + upcoming big fixture = expected changes

midweek_letdown.description: After big UCL/UEL result — emotional hangover into domestic match

motivation_gap.description: Title race / relegation battle vs mid-table nothing-to-play-for

travel_unfamiliarity.description: New ground / hostile atmosphere / altitude/turf adjustment

SCHEDULE_SQUEEZE.description: Compressed schedule + heavy travel + coming off emotional game

LOOKAHEAD_LETDOWN.description: Team looking past this game + motivation mismatch

CINDERELLA_CRASH.description: Cinderella after big upset + first-time pressure + 3rd game in 4 days

BULLPEN_BURN.description: Taxed bullpen + rotation spot disadvantage + getaway game

GOALIE_GRIND.description: Overworked goalie on B2B after travel

DEAD_TEAM_WALKING.description: Eliminated/tanking team with nothing to play for in late season

EUROPEAN_HANGOVER.description: Away European trip + congested fixture list + emotional letdown — fade heavily

CONGESTION_CRASH.description: 4+ matches in 10 days + heavy rotation expected + unfamiliar ground

DERBY_FIRE.description: Local derby with major stakes (relegation/title) — form goes out the window
